final_answer: The most common symptoms of COVID-19 include fever [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], cough [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011], loss of smell [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], loss of taste [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], headache [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011], muscle pain [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011], fatigue [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], and breathing difficulties [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]. These symptoms can vary in severity and may change over time [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011].
